name: 下一站江湖Ⅰ
publisher: 成都搜发互娱网络科技有限公司
short_description: "AdventureAwaitsⅠ" is a game that combines the jianghu, martial arts, collection, cultivation and war chess. You can experience the adventures and anecdotes in the Jianghu.
detailed_description:
To celebrate the release and official 80th update of the fifth major free-to-play sourcebook of AdventureAwaits II, Cold Scholar, we are offering a new all-time low discount on Jianghu 1!

Since AdventureAwaitsⅠ is an old work from a few years ago, please make sure to pay attention to the following points before purchasing:

1, due to financial constraints at the time, the art quality is poor, coupled with the fact that it is an old work from many years ago, the quality of the picture is relatively backward compared to modern games

2, the game's mode of operation was designed many years ago, the interactive experience may be less than ideal

3、Jianghu 1 data piece is on the low side, only released 4 data pieces

4, initially we only plan to make a handheld version, after the request of many warriors, we will be transplanted to the PC side of the game, but limited by the size of the team and the development of new products, the optimization effect of the PC version is not very satisfactory, the cell phone version of the experience will be relatively better!

Once again, we sincerely thank you for your company and support!

-----------------------------------

AdventureAwaitsⅠ, pure martial arts sandbox single-player game! (At present, 4 large-scale DLCs have been released continuously: Fengqi Southwest, Luocheng Winds, Dangkou Winds and Clouds, and Frightening Winds and Cang Yin Records)

Exploration challenges, martial arts adventure, martial arts collection, teammate development, sect construction, identity gameplay in one, to fulfill you a unique belong to your own sword Jianghu martial arts dream.

Game features

1, one-week program: small shrimp to break into the jianghu - multi-branch, multi-endings.

More than twenty endings waiting for you to explore, behind each event, you will face a variety of choices, different choices will bring you different destinies; whether it is the martial arts alliance, or the devil presses the right way, and even the East Factory Factory, into the phase of worship.

2, the second weekly program, self-built sect system.

The second weekly program began players can choose to break into the world with the previous shrimp is not the same life: self-built sects. (At present, we have opened up the Dragon Hidden Villa which can be the king of the world, the loyalty and righteousness of the anti-Japanese Beggar's Association; there are still the rich and powerful Da Jiang Canal General Association, and the majestic Shaolin and so on to open up the self-constructed sect system).

3、Three weekly programs, more initial identity life (PS: in the previous version of the feedback some players think that the opening of the three weekly programs is too long, so we will cancel the three weekly programs, to put more initial identity play into the weekly programs and the two weekly programs, please look forward to)

The village tavern boy (the latest version of the wind has been opened in the pale hidden record), Luoyang's playboy rich son, the imperial city downtrodden prince, Jiangnan into the capital to catch the exams of ten years of poor scholars and so on.

4、Multi-female main character.

Faced with a number of beautiful show of love, do not have to be bound by the plot, you can choose your favorite beautiful people with you to accompany the whole life. Of course, before you choose, you need to get their hearts.

6、Rich plot.

Up to a million words of plot to construct a huge martial arts world, hundreds of branches, there is always a road you want to go.

6、Multi-schools.

Sixty Jianghu sects, or positive or evil, is a friend or foe, whether you can learn martial arts, whether you can join the sect, end depends on how you act.

7、Ultra-high degree of freedom.

High degree of freedom of the sandbox world, regardless of the main line of freedom to break into the world, you can also travel the world to make friends, but also step on thousands of mountains and rivers in search of treasure.

8. Wargame-style turn-based combat.

Strategic wargame-style turn-based combat, the protagonist can freely choose weapons, free with skills, bringing unprecedented combat experience.

9、Free matching of skills.

There is no strongest martial arts, only the strongest people, experience the true meaning of the internal energy and moves through the phases. (The same Seven Injuries Fist and Toadstool, different people make it out is different.)

10、Multi-chance encounter

Jianghu everywhere is a strange encounter, danger and opportunity coexist, full of the spirit of adventure, fun and colorful at the same time, but also will bring different choices, towards a different fate.

11、Teammate development.

Numerous jianghu warriors, can be befriended, can be raised, can be together to break into the jianghu adventure, can be comprehended advanced martial arts.
